data.title: Euna Solutions hosted Eunaverse conference on Sept 8-10, 2025 in Atlanta & Toronto, uniting public sector leaders.
data.description: Euna Solutions®, a prominent provider of specialized cloud solutions for the public sector, revealed the triumphant conclusion of its inaugural user conference, Eunaverse. This event, spanning from Sept. 8-10, 2025, in Atlanta & Toronto, united public sector leaders, finance experts, and tech pioneers to share insights and envision the prospects of government technology. The conference, organized by Euna Solutions, attracted participants from various sectors such as procurement and budgeting.

data.title: Orbia to release Q3 2025 earnings on Oct 22, with conference call on Oct 23 at 9:00 a.m. MX | 11:00 a.m. ET. Key speakers to attend.
data.description: Mexico City-based Orbia Advance Corporation, S.A.B. de C.V. is set to announce its third-quarter 2025 earnings on October 22, 2025, after the market closes. Following this, a conference call and Q&A session with management will take place on October 23, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. MX | 11:00 a.m. ET. The speakers scheduled for the event are Sameer Bharadwaj, the Chief Executive Officer, Jim Kelly, the Chief Financial Officer, and Diego Echave, the VP of Investor Relations.

data.title: LambdaTest's TestMu Conference 2025 in San Francisco attracts 75,000+ registrations and features 100+ speakers, setting a new milestone in software testing.
data.description: A significant advancement in the field of software testing was achieved at the TestMu Conference 2025 hosted by LambdaTest in San Francisco. The event garnered an overwhelming response with over 75,000 registrations, indicating a strong interest and participation in the conference. Furthermore, the conference boasted a lineup of over 100 distinguished speakers, showcasing the industry's leading experts and thought leaders in attendance.

data.title: CoreSite inaugurates NY3 data center in New Jersey, adding 138,000 sq ft to New York capacity.
data.description: In Denver, CoreSite, a subsidiary of American Tower Corporation (NYSE: AMT), has unveiled its latest data center named NY3 in Secaucus, New Jersey. The newly completed facility, part of the New York metropolitan area, spans over 138,000 square feet, expanding CoreSite’s presence in New York. data.title: Update v2.0 of historical strategy game Ara: History Untold is out, featuring nation-specific units and leader traits.
data.description: A popular historical strategy game marks its one-year milestone by introducing nation-specific units, unique leader traits, and cultural conquest elements. The game, developed by Stardock Entertainment and Oxide Games in collaboration with Xbox Game Studios, has also included significant updates such as improved AI. Celebrating its anniversary in Plymouth, Mich., on September 24, 2025, the game continues to captivate players with its enhanced features and gameplay enhancements.

data.title: Digital Pathology Market to exceed US$3.86 billion by 2033 with a CAGR of 12.9% from 2025-2033, driven by AI diagnostics.
data.description: In September 25, 2025, it was reported that the Digital Pathology Market Size had increased to US$1.31 billion in 2024, up from US$1.17 billion in 2023. Projections indicate that this market is expected to further grow to US$3.86 billion by 2033, representing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 12.9% during the forecast period of 2025-2033. This substantial surge in growth highlights the increasing demand and adoption of digital pathology technologies.

data.title: Loss of smell can persist for years after COVID-19, study finds; even those unaware may be affected. 40-odor test used.
data.description: A recent study conducted in New York on September 25, 2025 reveals that individuals experiencing a diminished sense of smell after recovering from COVID-19 may be accurate in their perception. The study utilized a comprehensive 40-odor test to objectively assess olfactory capabilities. Surprisingly, the research suggests that even individuals who do not perceive any smell-related problems post-COVID may still have impaired olfactory function. The findings underscore the importance of acknowledging potential sensory alterations following COVID-19 infection.

data.title: Cintas beats Q1 sales forecast with $2.718B revenue (+8.7% YoY), $1.20 EPS in line. Analysts lower forecasts. CEO cites strong cash flow.
data.description: Cintas Corporation (NASDAQ: CTAS) exceeded expectations with its first-quarter sales, reporting a strong performance with earnings per share of $1.20, meeting analyst estimates. The company generated $2.718 billion in quarterly sales, marking an 8.7% increase from the previous year and surpassing the expected $2.698 billion. This revenue growth was boosted by 0.9% from acquisitions. CEO Todd M. Schneider highlighted the firm's cash flow strength, enabling it to focus on strategic capital allocation and shareholder returns. Cintas also raised its GAAP EPS guidance for fiscal 2026.

data.title: Perform Properties releases 2024 Sustainability and Social Impact Update Report after merging with ShopCore, ROIC, and EQ Office.
data.description: Perform Properties, a real estate operating platform based in New York and Santa Monica, has released its 2024 Sustainability and Social Impact Update Report. The report, which is the first since the integration of ShopCore, ROIC, and EQ Office, focuses on the company's efforts in promoting environmental sustainability and social impact. Perform specializes in high-quality grocery-anchored retail centers and premier office assets. The update highlights the company's commitment to these initiatives and showcases the progress made in these areas.

data.title: Mattel and Hot Wheels collaborate with Audi to launch new vehicle building sets: Audi Avant RS2 (1:32 scale) and Audi R8 LMS (1:16 scale).
data.description: Based in El Segundo, California, Mattel, Inc. (NASDAQ: MAT), a prominent toy and entertainment company, revealed a partnership involving its Mattel Brick Shop™ line and Hot Wheels®. Hot Wheels®, the world's top-selling toy*, teamed up with quattro GmbH and Auto Union GmbH, subsidiaries of AUDI AG, to introduce two new vehicle building sets. This includes an Audi Avant RS2 in 1:32 scale and the Audi R8 LMS in 1:16 scale.

data.title: Holman Logistics appoints Alex Stark as Director of Marketing. Stark to oversee all marketing operations.
data.description: In Federal Way, Washington, on September 25, 2025, Holman Logistics announced the appointment of Alex Stark as their new Director of Marketing. Stark will work under the guidance of Holman President Mike Gardner and oversee all communication and marketing activities for the company. This move signifies a strategic step by Holman Logistics to enhance their marketing capabilities.

data.title: Karol G collaborates with Casa Dragones Tequila for 200 Copas Cristalino, celebrating luxury and shared moments. Launch at Crazy Horse in Paris.
data.description: Renowned singer Karol G has collaborated with Casa Dragones to introduce their inaugural Cristalino expression, inspired by her hit song "200 Copas." The debut of this special release will be commemorated with a ceremonial toast at the iconic Crazy Horse venue in Paris. This exciting announcement was made on September 25, 2025, in New York. Celebrity Karol G unveils '200' alongside Casa Dragones in a unique partnership, marking a significant milestone in her career.

data.title: SOO Green gets final municipal franchise agreement, advancing project to construction. Push for grid investment strategy in Springfield.
data.description: In Springfield, Illinois, on September 25th, 2025, SOO Green disclosed approval on the last phase of a jointly owned transmission project. The project is a collaboration between energyRe and Copenhagen Infrastructure Partners (CIP). This marks a significant step forward towards enhancing the grid system. The initiative aims to foster a cohesive investment strategy for optimizing grid infrastructure. The project signifies a crucial milestone in the concerted effort towards grid modernization and sustainability.

data.title: Latin Biz Today partners with Visit Lauderdale to promote Greater Fort Lauderdale as prime destination for Latino businesses, Sept. 25, 2025.
data.description: Achieving a harmonious balance between work, life, and culture is essential for the prosperity of the Latino business community within Greater Fort Lauderdale. Latin Biz Today (Latin Business Today, LLC) based in Croton-on-Hudson, N.Y., emphasized this during a recent event on September 25, 2025. This balance plays a critical role in driving the success and growth of Latino businesses in the region. It is an integral part of fostering a thriving business environment and was a key focus of discussions among community leaders and entrepreneurs. This initiative highlights the significance of embracing diversity, inclusivity, and creating a conducive atmosphere for business development in the region, ultimately benefiting the local economy.

data.title: Neda Nobari introduces Maryam Mirzakhani Presidential Scholarships at San Francisco State Univ: full-ride for first-gen STEM students.
data.description: In a significant development, MOZAIK Philanthropy has announced a substantial endowment in San Francisco on September 25, 2025. This impactful initiative includes full-ride scholarships and leadership training for first-generation students in STEM disciplines. By enabling access and support to these pioneering individuals, the endowment aims to foster innovation and shape the future of STEM fields.
